name: Vocode

when_to_use: Building voice AI apps with STT/LLM/TTS pipeline in open source
Creating automated phone call agents with Python SDK
Deploying inbound and outbound voice bots on telephony platforms
Prototyping voice AI features with a modular open-source stack

cons: Assembling prod stack takes real work
Ops burden vs managed voice SaaS
review.verdict: The hacker-friendly choice for custom voice agents; pick managed services if you value time over control.
review.best_for: Engineering teams building bespoke voice agents with custom TTS, STT and logic
review.not_for: Business teams who just want a working phone bot without writing Python
